spec.name: Pixelflow Animator
spec.pain_point: Pixel art creators lack a streamlined tool for designing, previewing, and exporting smooth sprite animations with real-time editing and playback.
core_features: Smooth sprite animation preview and export

raw_idea: Pixelflow Animator: A real-time pixel art animation tool that lets creators design, preview, and export smooth sprite animations with frame-by-frame editing and instant playback.
